homepage.heroSubline: Transforming outdoor spaces with unmatched skill and dedication. Sorto Landscaping LLC delivers lasting beauty and functionality to your property.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Expertise, Rooted in Charlotte
aboutText: Sorto Landscaping LLC began over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide Charlotte-area residents with superior hardscaping solutions. Founded by seasoned professionals, we recognized a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of our local climate and soil.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, quality materials, and flawless execution. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every project, big or small. We treat every property as if it were our own, ensuring lasting value and satisfaction.

We're proud to be a part of the Charlotte community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local initiatives, and are committed to sustainable practices that protect our environment. When you choose Sorto Landscaping, you're choosing a partner who cares about the future of our city.

services.name: Paver Installation
services.shortDescription: Elevate your outdoor living with stunning paver patios, walkways, and driveways.
services.description:
From classic brick to modern concrete, pavers offer unparalleled versatility and durability for your outdoor surfaces. Sorto Landscaping LLC specializes in expert paver installation throughout the Charlotte area. We handle every step of the process, from site preparation and base construction to precise paver placement and sealing. 

We understand the importance of proper drainage in Charlotte's red clay soil, which is why we pay close attention to grading and base compaction. Our experienced team ensures a level, stable surface that will withstand the test of time and weather. Whether you're looking to create a cozy patio for entertaining or a grand driveway that makes a statement, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. 

We offer a wide selection of paver styles, colors, and patterns to complement your home's architecture and personal taste. Our design consultants will work with you to choose the perfect pavers and create a custom layout that maximizes your outdoor space. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and commitment to quality, ensuring a beautiful and functional paver installation that you'll enjoy for years to come.

faq.question: How long does paver installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of paver installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. A typical patio installation can take 3-5 days, while larger projects may take longer. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation process.

faq.question: What type of pavers are best for Charlotte's climate?
faq.answer: Concrete pavers are a great choice for Charlotte's climate due to their durability and resistance to freeze-thaw cycles. Natural stone pavers are also a beautiful and long-lasting option, but may require more maintenance.

faq.question: Do you offer paver repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer paver repair services to address issues such as cracks, settling, and loose pavers. Our team can assess the damage and provide effective solutions to restore your paver surface.

services.name: Retaining Walls
services.shortDescription: Control erosion and add structural beauty with expertly designed and built retaining walls.
services.description:
Retaining walls are essential for managing soil erosion and creating usable outdoor spaces in Charlotte's often hilly terrain. Sorto Landscaping LLC specializes in designing and constructing durable and aesthetically pleasing retaining walls that meet your specific needs. We work with a variety of materials, including concrete blocks, natural stone, and timber, to create walls that complement your landscape and architecture. 

Our experienced team understands the importance of proper engineering and construction techniques to ensure the stability and longevity of your retaining wall. We take into account factors such as soil type, drainage, and load-bearing requirements to create a wall that will withstand the forces of nature. Whether you need a small garden wall or a large structural wall, we have the expertise to get the job done right. 

We are well-versed in the Mecklenburg County permitting process and will ensure that your retaining wall meets all local regulations and safety standards. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and excavation to backfilling and finishing touches. Our goal is to provide you with a functional and beautiful retaining wall that enhances the value and usability of your property.

faq.question: How high can a retaining wall be without a permit?
faq.answer: In Mecklenburg County, retaining walls over 4 feet in height typically require a building permit. We can handle the permitting process for you to ensure compliance with local regulations.

faq.question: What type of drainage is required for a retaining wall?
faq.answer: Proper drainage is essential for the longevity of a retaining wall. We typically install a perforated drain pipe behind the wall to collect and redirect water away from the soil. We also use a gravel backfill to promote drainage.

faq.question: How long will a retaining wall last?
faq.answer: With proper design and construction, a well-built retaining wall can last for 50 years or more. The lifespan of the wall will depend on factors such as the materials used, the soil conditions, and the amount of maintenance it receives.

services.name: Outdoor Fireplaces
services.shortDescription: Create a cozy gathering spot with a custom-built outdoor fireplace or fire pit.
services.description:
Extend your outdoor season and create a warm and inviting atmosphere with a custom-built outdoor fireplace or fire pit. Sorto Landscaping LLC specializes in designing and constructing beautiful and functional outdoor fireplaces that become the focal point of your backyard. We work with a variety of materials, including brick, stone, and concrete, to create fireplaces that complement your home's architecture and personal style. 

Our experienced team can help you choose the perfect location for your outdoor fireplace, taking into account factors such as prevailing winds, proximity to structures, and local fire codes. We handle all aspects of the project, from excavation and foundation to masonry and chimney construction. We also ensure that your fireplace is properly vented and meets all safety standards. 

Whether you're looking for a traditional wood-burning fireplace or a modern gas-fueled fire pit, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We can also incorporate features such as seating areas, storage for firewood, and decorative elements to create a truly custom outdoor space that you'll enjoy for years to come. Gather around the fire with friends and family and create lasting memories in your own backyard oasis.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an outdoor fireplace?
faq.answer: In most cases, a permit is required for an outdoor fireplace in Charlotte. We can handle the permitting process for you to ensure compliance with local regulations.

faq.question: What is the best material for an outdoor fireplace?
faq.answer: Brick and stone are both popular choices for outdoor fireplaces due to their durability and aesthetic appeal. Concrete is also a viable option, especially for modern designs.

faq.question: How far should an outdoor fireplace be from my house?
faq.answer: It's generally recommended to keep an outdoor fireplace at least 10 feet away from any structures, including your house, fences, and trees. Check with your local fire department for specific regulations.

services.name: Outdoor Kitchens
services.shortDescription: Elevate your outdoor entertaining with a custom-designed outdoor kitchen.
services.description:
Bring the joy of cooking and entertaining outdoors with a custom-designed outdoor kitchen by Sorto Landscaping LLC. We specialize in creating functional and stylish outdoor kitchens that seamlessly integrate with your existing landscape. From simple grilling stations to fully equipped culinary centers, we can design and build an outdoor kitchen that meets your specific needs and budget. 

Our experienced team will work with you to choose the perfect location for your outdoor kitchen, taking into account factors such as sunlight exposure, proximity to utilities, and traffic flow. We handle all aspects of the project, from design and construction to appliance installation and plumbing. We use only high-quality materials that are designed to withstand the elements, ensuring that your outdoor kitchen will last for years to come. 

We can incorporate features such as built-in grills, refrigerators, sinks, countertops, and storage cabinets to create a fully functional outdoor cooking space. We can also add features such as bars, seating areas, and lighting to create a comfortable and inviting entertainment area. Impress your guests with delicious meals prepared in your own custom outdoor kitchen.

faq.question: What appliances should I include in my outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: The appliances you include in your outdoor kitchen will depend on your cooking style and entertaining needs. Popular choices include a built-in grill, refrigerator, sink, side burner, and pizza oven.

faq.question: What type of countertops are best for outdoor kitchens?
faq.answer: Granite, concrete, and stainless steel are all durable and weather-resistant options for outdoor kitchen countertops. Choose a material that complements your overall design and personal style.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: In most cases, a permit is required for an outdoor kitchen in Charlotte, especially if it includes plumbing or electrical work. We can handle the permitting process for you to ensure compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Protect your property from water damage with effective drainage solutions.
services.description:
Charlotte's red clay soil and frequent heavy rains can create serious drainage problems for homeowners. Sorto Landscaping LLC specializes in providing effective drainage solutions that protect your property from water damage, erosion, and foundation issues. We understand the unique challenges of our local climate and soil conditions, and we have the expertise to design and implement drainage systems that work. 

Our experienced team will assess your property to identify areas where water is pooling or causing damage. We'll then design a custom drainage system that effectively redirects water away from your home and landscape. We offer a variety of drainage solutions, including French drains, surface drains, downspout extensions, and grading adjustments. 

We use only high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your drainage system is durable and effective. We also pay close attention to aesthetics, ensuring that your drainage system blends seamlessly with your landscape. Protect your investment and prevent costly repairs with a professionally installed drainage system from Sorto Landscaping LLC.

faq.question: What is a French drain?
faq.answer: A French drain is a trench filled with gravel or rock that contains a perforated pipe. It's used to redirect surface and subsurface water away from a specific area.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a drainage system?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a drainage system include standing water in your yard, erosion, water in your basement, and foundation cracks.

faq.question: How much does a drainage system cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a drainage system will depend on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed estimate after assessing your property and determining the best drainage solution for your needs.

services.name: Concrete Work
services.shortDescription: Durable and reliable concrete solutions for driveways, patios, and walkways.
services.description:
Sorto Landscaping LLC provides comprehensive concrete services for residential and commercial properties in Charlotte. From new driveways and patios to repairs and replacements, we deliver high-quality concrete work that stands the test of time. We understand the importance of proper preparation, mixing, and pouring techniques to ensure a strong and durable concrete surface. 

Our experienced team uses only the best materials and equipment to create smooth, level, and crack-resistant concrete surfaces. We can also add decorative finishes such as stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your project. Whether you need a new driveway, a patio extension, or a concrete walkway, we have the expertise to get the job done right. 

We are committed to providing our customers with exceptional service and quality workmanship. We handle all aspects of the project, from excavation and formwork to pouring and finishing. We also ensure that your concrete project meets all local building codes and safety standards. Trust Sorto Landscaping LLC for all your concrete needs in Charlotte.

faq.question: How thick should a concrete driveway be?
faq.answer: A concrete driveway should typically be at least 4 inches thick for residential use. For heavier vehicles or commercial applications, a thickness of 5-6 inches is recommended.

faq.question: How long does it take for concrete to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure, but it can be walked on after 24 hours and driven on after 7 days. Proper curing is essential for the strength and durability of the concrete.

faq.question: What is stamped concrete?
faq.answer: Stamped concrete is a decorative concrete technique that involves imprinting patterns and textures onto the surface of freshly poured concrete. It can be used to mimic the look of brick, stone, or other materials.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Sorto Landscaping transformed our backyard! The paver patio they installed is absolutely beautiful and exactly what we envisioned. The crew was professional, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. We couldn't be happier with the results!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We needed a retaining wall to prevent erosion on our property, and Sorto Landscaping did an excellent job. The wall is sturdy and looks great. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated clearly and kept us informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: Our new outdoor fireplace is the perfect addition to our backyard. Sorto Landscaping helped us design a fireplace that fits our style and budget. The craftsmanship is outstanding, and we've already enjoyed many cozy evenings by the fire. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: After years of dealing with standing water in our yard, we finally called Sorto Landscaping. They installed a French drain system that completely solved the problem. Our yard is now dry and usable, even after heavy rains. Thank you!

reviews.name: Ashley K.
reviews.text: Sorto Landscaping replaced our old, cracked driveway with a beautiful new concrete driveway. The crew was professional and efficient, and the driveway looks great. There were a few minor issues with the finishing, but they promptly addressed them to our satisfaction.

reviews.name: Michael L.
reviews.text: The outdoor kitchen Sorto Landscaping built for us is amazing! We now have a fully functional cooking and entertaining space in our backyard. The quality of the materials and workmanship is exceptional. We highly recommend them for any hardscaping project.
